steps.title: Identify cause and effect
steps.content: The second sentence explains the reduction-firing technique: smothering the flame around the clay vessel. The next sentence gives the effect of that technique, the shiny black hue.

steps.title: Pick the result transition
steps.content: Choice A signals contradiction. Choice B signals an example, not an effect. Choice C signals earlier time. Choice D signals result, matching the relationship between smothering the flame and the vessel's black hue. The answer is D.
